name: pomr-coach
description: Local-first POMR practice workspace for medical clerkship students.
author: HealCode

scripts.build:cloudrun: node scripts/with-cloudrun-build-env.mjs npm run prisma:generate:web && node scripts/with-cloudrun-build-env.mjs next build
scripts.db:push:web: node scripts/with-web-env.mjs node scripts/ensure-postgres-url.mjs && node scripts/with-web-env.mjs prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.postgres.prisma && node scripts/with-web-env.mjs npm run prisma:generate:web
scripts.dev:web: node scripts/with-web-env.mjs node scripts/ensure-postgres-url.mjs && node scripts/with-web-env.mjs npm run prisma:generate:web && node scripts/with-web-env.mjs next dev
scripts.build:web: node scripts/with-web-env.mjs node scripts/ensure-postgres-url.mjs && node scripts/with-web-env.mjs npm run prisma:generate:web && node scripts/with-web-env.mjs next build
